**Entity:** [Entity Name - Lumberyard/Barracks/Blacksmith/Market]

## 📋 I understand and agree to:

- [ ] I have read the [PR Submission Guidelines](../../quests/template.md)
- [ ] I will implement ONLY the abstract methods in the class
- [ ] I will write comprehensive unit tests for my implementation
- [ ] I will only modify 2 files: `{Entity}.java` and `{Entity}Test.java`
- [ ] I will follow the strict naming conventions
- [ ] I will include a UML diagram in my PR
- [ ] I will submit my PR within 5 days of claiming this quest
- [ ] I understand my PR will be automatically closed if it violates the 2-file-only rule
